name: Cotton Harrington Jacket
description: A straightforward Harrington cut — short length, fitted waistband, simple collar. The proportions do the work, not the branding.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: The bomber covers technical, weatherproof days. This covers the rest — a jacket I can wear over a shirt without it reading as sporty. Navy is the one I'd actually reach for on a normal weekday.
whatItReplaces: Doesn't replace the bomber — it covers occasions where the bomber's technical, sporty read is the wrong note and something with a collar makes more sense.
whyIChooseThis: Over heritage-brand Harringtons: same proportion, a price I can replace without thinking twice. Over the bomber for smarter occasions: this collar reads more considered.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Over the Supima tee with the selvedge jeans. Over the linen shirt on cooler evenings.
layeringCombinations: Over the Supima tee. Over the relaxed poplin shirt for something dressier.
colourCombinations: Navy is the priority colour. Black is the realistic second option if the jacket earns a permanent place in the rotation.
bestOccasions: Smart-casual, occasions the bomber reads as too sporty for
costPerWearReasoning: ₹5,990 for a piece that would see real use maybe a dozen times a year at first — worth adding once the bomber's limitations actually show up in practice, not before.
whatMakesItTimeless: A proportion that's stayed correct for seventy years because it was never about trend to begin with.
whatProblemItSolves: A lightweight jacket for spring and autumn that isn't technical or sporty.
whatCouldReplaceIt: The technical bomber for wet weather, but this is the one for everything else.
similarPiecesIWouldProbablyLike: Massimo Dutti Technical Bomber Jacket (same in-between-season role).
layeringOver: the Supima tee or the poplin shirt
alternativeUnder3000: H&M Cotton Harrington Jacket (~₹2,499 at hm.com/in) — slightly less structured
alternativeUnder10000: Massimo Dutti at sale price (~₹6,000-₹8,000) — heavier construction
premiumAlternative: Baracuta G9 Harrington (~₹60,000 import via baracuta.com) — the original; Milanese construction
buyRecommendation: Wait for Sale — Zara has very frequent sales; this can drop to ₹2,500-₹3,000. No reason to pay full price.
